content:
### 最新の関連Xポスト（2026年1月以降、Latest順で抽出・選定）

1. **本文**: S&P 500 down 4.6% YTD. Oil up 66%. Tariffs at 12%. Fed frozen. Most dangerous macro cocktail since 2008. And retail is still holding meme stocks. Good luck out there.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/GiuliaTrades/status/2041364592505557424  
   **日時**: 2026-04-07

2. **本文**: Here's what the numbers look like right now: S&P 500 year-end target: cut from 7,600 to 7,300 CPI forecast for 2026: revised UP to 3.8% GDP growth: trimmed to 2.0% Average tariff cost per US household: $1,500 this year Passive investors are just absorbing all of this. AI-assisted ones are adapting. There's a difference.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TheWealtharian/status/2041164992439779786  
   **日時**: 2026-04-06

3. **本文**: One year ago today: Liberation Day. Global tariffs. Market panic. Recession forecasts everywhere. One year later: S&P 500 +16%. Now we have: Iran war, oil near $100, sticky inflation, Shiller PE at 40 — dot-com bubble levels. KKR just cut US GDP forecast to 2% for 2026. And crypto is at Fear & Greed 12. Extreme Fear. Two things can be simultaneously true: the macro backdrop is genuinely difficult. And markets have a consistent history of recovering faster than anyone expects. The question isn't whether things improve. It's whether you're positioned when they do. (Not financial advice.)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/Samerman77/status/2040403007590822036  
   **日時**: 2026-04-04

4. **本文**: The Liberation Day tariff numbers: Minimum 10% tariff on every US trading partner. China, EU, Japan hit harder. Goldman just raised US recession odds to 45%. JPMorgan says 60% chance of a global recession. Brent crude up 8%. March jobs report: just +57K payrolls added. A lot is happening. Here is the signal through the noise: markets are repricing risk, not declaring the end of the world.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TheWealtharian/status/2039923426597405071  
   **日時**: 2026-04-03

5. **本文**: It turns out Liberation Day didn't resolve the recession question. A year later, Polymarket prices a US recession at 30% by end of 2026. The market peaked near 45% last fall, fell to 20% when courts started pushing back, and is back above 30% as the anniversary lands. That's $1M+ wagered on a number that keeps repricing every time a new tariff order clears a desk.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/asteraappai/status/2039464404354290120  
   **日時**: 2026-04-01

6. **本文**: 62.5% of geopolitical corrections produce a V-shaped recovery. Bottom to new highs in under 6 months. 1990 Gulf War. COVID 2020. April 2025 tariffs. The #1 factor? Whether it tips into recession. Without recession, markets recover. Every time. Recession odds: Moody's 49%. Goldman 30%. Not at 70-80% where bear markets become inevitable. The setup is forming underneath the fear.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/alexkoh/status/2039025452162179299  
   **日時**: 2026-03-31

7. **本文**: 2008 GFC Crash: ▫️ S&P 500 dumped 20%, then pumped 14% before another 53% drop. 2020 Covid Crash: ▫️ $SPX dumped 15%, then pumped 9% before another 30% drop. 2025 Tariffs Crash: ▫️ SPX dumped 10%, then pumped 5% before another 16% drop. 2026 Dump: ▫️ SPX has dropped 9% and could drop a bit more. After that a relief rally will happen, followed by another leg down.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TedPillows/status/2038196970393846129  
   **日時**: 2026-03-29

8. **本文**: Hard to believe looking at the index but we have retraced further than the multiple contraction during the tariff tantrum. We are actually all the way down near 2022 lows levels. For those who believe we need to pull back significantly more, the combination of substantial re-rating, significant degrossing, and hedging creates a powerful state that could potentially allow us to climb back higher. Keep in mind we could be in the formation of a bubble similar to 1997-98 when the market pulled back 20%+ a few times. The war is overshadowing the underlying technological boom.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TheShortBear/status/2036807231241404879  
   **日時**: 2026-03-25

9. **本文**: Just like $BTC, the S&P 500 has gone down 15%-20% during mid-term election years. Also, SPX got rejected from its 8-year resistance trendline, which could result in a prolonged correction. IMO, SPX could drop $5,600-$5,800 in 2026 before reversal.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TedPillows/status/2033138758040637559  
   **日時**: 2026-03-15

10. **本文**: S&P 500 wipes out ALL 2026 gains tariff turmoil & recession fears crush bull run! Wall Street bloodbath as Trump trade wars hit hard. Buckle up! 📉💥🔴  
    **URL**: https://x.com/Pankajmittl7/status/2013690423340904546  
    **日時**: 2026-01-20
